response.justification: Aisha has deep technical expertise, strong open-source contributions, and extensive full-stack experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and critically, only has basic German proficiency — a mandatory requirement for the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with GISCollective and DLang libraries
Proven full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops
concerns: German proficiency is only basic, failing to meet C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML expertise or formal IT architecture leadership
Lacks documented experience managing teams or leading client-facing technical strategy
